title: Freezer, Cooler & Deli Stocker Associate
description:
Alto HR is recruiting Freezer, Cooler & Deli Stocker Associates for our Walmart client in Destin, FL. You will maintain product levels across the frozen foods, cooler, and deli sections, ensuring shelves are stocked, rotated, and clean at all times.

Responsibilities:
- Stock and rotate frozen food, refrigerated, and deli department products
- Maintain cleanliness and organization of assigned sections
- Operate powered pallet jacks and stock equipment safely
- Assist customers with product location and inquiries
- Meet store-level stocking productivity benchmarks

Requirements:
- Ability to lift up to 50 lbs and work in cold environments (freezer, cooler areas)
- Reliable, punctual, and team-oriented
- Previous retail or stocking experience preferred but not required
- Availability to work early morning, evening, or overnight shifts

Alto HR handles all onboarding, HR, and payroll. You will be placed as a W-2 employee from day one.

title: Merchandise & Stocking Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing Merchandise & Stocking Associates at our Walmart Miramar Beach client location. Associates will work across general merchandise, grocery, and seasonal departments to ensure shelves are fully stocked and organized.

Responsibilities:
- Unload merchandise from pallets and stock shelves efficiently
- Rotate product and remove out-of-date items
- Set up and maintain seasonal displays
- Maintain backroom organization and safety standards
- Collaborate with store management to meet department goals

Requirements:
- Physical ability to lift up to 50 lbs and stand for extended periods
- Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently
- Retail or warehouse experience a plus
- Flexible availability including weekends and early mornings

Competitive wages starting at $15/hr. Alto HR manages all HR administration and compliance.

title: Merchandise & Stocking Associate Supervisor
description:
Alto HR is seeking an experienced Merchandise & Stocking Associate Supervisor for a leadership role at our Walmart Destin client. In this role, you will oversee a team of stocking associates, ensuring department productivity, quality, and compliance.

Responsibilities:
- Supervise and guide a team of merchandise and stocking associates
- Assign daily tasks and monitor productivity against store benchmarks
- Train new associates on safety, procedures, and stocking standards
- Communicate with store management on inventory and staffing needs
- Ensure backroom and sales floor meet compliance and appearance standards

Requirements:
- 1+ year of retail supervisory or team lead experience
- Strong communication and leadership skills
- Ability to manage teams in a fast-paced, high-volume environment
- Reliability and commitment to consistent attendance
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and work on feet for extended periods

title: Front-End Cashier
description:
Alto HR is recruiting Front-End Cashiers for our Walmart client in Santa Rosa Beach, FL. This customer-facing role is the face of the store — providing fast, friendly checkout service and a positive shopping experience.

Responsibilities:
- Operate cash register and process transactions accurately (cash, card, EBT)
- Greet customers and provide a welcoming, professional experience
- Handle returns, exchanges, and customer inquiries
- Maintain a clean and organized checkout area
- Support self-checkout lanes and customer service desk as needed

Requirements:
- Strong customer service skills and a positive attitude
- Basic math and cash-handling ability
- Ability to stand for extended periods and work efficiently under pressure
- Previous cashier or retail experience preferred
- Flexible availability including weekends and holidays

title: Produce Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing Produce Associates at our Walmart client in Santa Rosa Beach. You will be responsible for maintaining fresh, well-stocked produce displays that meet the store's high quality and presentation standards.

Responsibilities:
- Stock, rotate, and display fresh produce items daily
- Inspect product quality and remove damaged or expired items
- Maintain cleanliness of produce section, including coolers and bins
- Assist customers in finding and selecting fresh produce
- Receive produce deliveries and process incoming inventory

Requirements:
- Ability to work in cooler/refrigerated environments
- Attention to detail and pride in product presentation
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and stand for extended shifts
- Experience in produce, deli, or fresh foods preferred
- Early morning availability (shifts typically start 5am–6am)

title: Produce Supervisor
description:
Alto HR is recruiting a Produce Supervisor for our Walmart Miramar Beach client. This leadership role oversees the daily operations of the produce department, ensuring quality, presentation, and team productivity.

Responsibilities:
- Lead and develop a team of produce associates
- Plan and execute daily stocking, rotation, and display standards
- Monitor shrink and freshness metrics, report to store management
- Order, receive, and track produce inventory
- Maintain compliance with food safety standards and department audits

Requirements:
- 1+ year of produce or fresh foods supervisory experience
- Strong knowledge of fresh produce handling, storage, and rotation
- Leadership and communication skills
- Food safety certification preferred (or willingness to obtain)
- Reliable transportation and consistent attendance

title: Freezer & Cooler Stocker Supervisor
description:
Alto HR is placing a Freezer & Cooler Stocker Supervisor at our Walmart Destin location. You will lead a team maintaining frozen foods and refrigerated sections, ensuring quality standards and high productivity.

Responsibilities:
- Supervise a team of freezer/cooler associates across evening or overnight shifts
- Assign tasks, monitor stocking progress, and ensure department productivity
- Enforce cold chain compliance and product rotation standards
- Train associates on safe operation of pallet jacks and cold-storage equipment
- Communicate inventory gaps and operational issues to store management

Requirements:
- Retail or logistics supervisory experience preferred
- Comfort working in cold environments (freezer sections)
- Ability to operate or quickly learn powered pallet equipment
- Strong leadership presence and communication skills
- Flexible availability — evening and overnight shifts common

title: Stocking & Unloading Associate
description:
Alto HR is recruiting Stocking & Unloading Associates for our Walmart Destin client. This physically active role involves unloading merchandise trucks and stocking shelves throughout the store.

Responsibilities:
- Unload merchandise trailers and palletize product for department stocking
- Stock shelves throughout the store per store planogram and standards
- Operate equipment including pallet jacks, hand trucks, and stock carts
- Maintain backroom cleanliness and organization
- Meet daily unloading and stocking productivity goals

Requirements:
- Physical ability to lift 50+ lbs and stand/move for extended periods
- Reliable attendance and strong work ethic
- Ability to work in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment
- Previous warehouse, unloading, or retail stocking experience a plus
- Flexible shifts — early morning and overnight openings available

title: Janitorial Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing Janitorial Associates at our Walmart Panama City Beach client location. This essential role keeps the store clean, safe, and welcoming for customers and associates throughout the day.

Responsibilities:
- Clean and sanitize restrooms, customer areas, and common spaces
- Sweep, mop, and maintain floor cleanliness across the store
- Empty trash receptacles and maintain waste disposal areas
- Respond promptly to spills, accidents, and urgent cleaning needs
- Operate floor cleaning machines and maintain janitorial supply inventory

Requirements:
- Previous janitorial, custodial, or cleaning experience preferred
- Reliability, attention to detail, and pride in cleanliness
- Physical ability to lift 30 lbs, bend, and work on feet for full shifts
- Customer-friendly demeanor when interacting with shoppers
- Flexible availability — morning, evening, and weekend shifts available

title: Bagger / Cart Associate
description:
Alto HR is recruiting Bagger/Cart Associates for our Walmart Fort Walton Beach client. This front-end, customer-facing role is critical to a fast, friendly checkout experience.

Responsibilities:
- Bag groceries and merchandise quickly and efficiently at checkout
- Assist customers in carrying or loading their purchases
- Retrieve and organize shopping carts from parking areas
- Maintain cleanliness at checkout lanes and front entrance
- Support cashiers and front-end team as needed

Requirements:
- Positive, customer-first attitude and strong communication skills
- Physical ability to lift 40 lbs and work outdoors in Florida weather
- High energy and ability to stay on your feet for extended shifts
- No experience required — Alto HR will train all new associates
- Flexible availability including evenings and weekends

title: General Merchandise Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing General Merchandise Associates for our Walmart Panama City client. You'll work across the general merchandise floor — electronics, clothing, home goods, sporting goods, and seasonal — keeping sections stocked and organized.

Responsibilities:
- Stock and organize merchandise across assigned general merchandise sections
- Create and maintain clean, shoppable displays per planogram
- Locate items for customers and assist with product questions
- Process returns and re-merchandise items to the sales floor
- Perform inventory counts and assist with periodic audits

Requirements:
- Ability to multi-task across multiple sections of a large retail store
- Customer service mindset with strong interpersonal skills
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and operate stock equipment
- Retail or warehouse experience preferred
- Flexible availability including evenings and weekends

title: Overnight Stock Associate
description:
Alto HR is recruiting Overnight Stock Associates for our Walmart Gulf Shores client. This overnight role is ideal for candidates who prefer quiet, team-focused shifts with minimal customer interaction.

Responsibilities:
- Stock shelves overnight across multiple departments
- Organize backroom and process incoming product deliveries
- Build seasonal endcaps and execute promotional resets
- Ensure departments are fully stocked and ready for morning opening
- Follow all safety protocols and store standards

Requirements:
- Willingness and availability to work overnight shifts (typically 10pm–7am)
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and work on feet for extended periods
- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision
- Reliable transportation — overnight transit may be limited
- No experience required; Alto HR provides full training

title: Customer Service Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing Customer Service Associates for our Walmart Pensacola client. This flexible, customer-facing role supports the service desk, returns, and general floor assistance.

Responsibilities:
- Assist customers at the service desk with returns, exchanges, and inquiries
- Process returns efficiently and accurately using store POS system
- Answer phone calls and direct customer questions appropriately
- Support front-end operations during peak traffic periods
- Maintain a professional, welcoming attitude at all times

Requirements:
- Previous customer service or retail experience strongly preferred
- Strong verbal communication and conflict-resolution skills
- Comfort with computer systems and basic data entry
- Professional appearance and positive demeanor
- Flexible availability including weekends and holidays

title: Grocery Department Associate
description:
Alto HR is placing full-time Grocery Department Associates at our Walmart Miramar Beach client. This role spans the dry grocery, canned goods, snack, and beverage aisles — keeping shelves full and the shopping experience smooth.

Responsibilities:
- Stock and rotate dry grocery items across assigned aisles
- Maintain price labels, product facing, and aisle organization
- Process weekly and daily resets as directed by department management
- Assist customers in locating grocery items
- Support inventory control and assist with periodic audits

Requirements:
- Detail-oriented and organized with strong stocking fundamentals
- Physical ability to lift 50 lbs and stand for full shifts
- Retail or grocery experience preferred
- Full-time availability including early mornings
- Strong reliability and attendance record

title: Sporting Goods & Outdoor Associate
description:
Alto HR is recruiting a Sporting Goods & Outdoor Associate for our Walmart Fort Walton Beach client. Ideal for candidates with a passion for outdoor activities, hunting, fishing, or sports — this role puts that knowledge to work on the sales floor.

Responsibilities:
- Stock and organize sporting goods, hunting, fishing, and outdoor sections
- Assist customers in selecting the right equipment, gear, or ammunition
- Maintain department displays, endcaps, and seasonal promotions
- Process firearms and ammunition sales in compliance with store and legal guidelines
- Perform inventory counts and assist with weekly resets

Requirements:
- Knowledge of sporting goods, fishing, hunting, or outdoor recreation preferred
- Customer service skills and willingness to assist and engage shoppers
- Ability to lift 50 lbs and stand for extended periods
- Reliable attendance and professional conduct
- Must be 18+ (required for firearms/ammunition handling)

title: Pharmacy Technician Assistant
description:
Alto HR is placing a Pharmacy Technician Assistant for our Walmart Panama City Beach client. This role supports the pharmacy team with administrative tasks, customer service, and prescription assistance under the supervision of licensed pharmacists.

Responsibilities:
- Assist customers at the pharmacy counter and drive-through
- Process prescription drop-offs and pick-ups accurately
- Support inventory management and restocking of pharmacy supplies
- Operate pharmacy software systems for data entry and verification
- Maintain compliance with pharmacy regulations and privacy standards

Requirements:
- High school diploma or equivalent required
- Previous pharmacy technician or healthcare customer service experience preferred
- Strong attention to detail and accuracy with data entry
- Excellent customer service and communication skills
- Florida Pharmacy Technician registration (or willingness to obtain within 90 days)

title: Lead Supervisor
description:
Alto HR is placing a Lead Supervisor across our Walmart locations in the Florida Panhandle. You'll lead supervisors and front-line associates across departments, owning shift execution, daily targets, and team development.

  Responsibilities:
  - Direct supervisors and associates across multiple departments during your shift
  - Drive daily productivity, recovery, and customer service standards
  - Coach team members on procedures, safety, and Walmart standards
  - Resolve escalations from associates, customers, and management
  - Partner with store leadership on staffing, scheduling, and performance

Requirements:
  - 2+ years of retail supervisory or lead experience
  - Proven ability to lead, coach, and motivate a team
  - Strong decision-making under pressure
  - Excellent communication and conflict-resolution skills
  - Open availability including evenings and weekends
location: Santa Rosa Beach, FL · Miramar Beach, FL · Panama City Beach, FL

title: Shift Lead
description:
Alto HR is placing a Shift Lead across our Walmart locations in the Florida Panhandle. You'll be the on-the-floor leader during your shift — directing associates, keeping departments moving, and ensuring a great customer experience.

  Responsibilities:
  - Lead associates during your assigned shift
  - Open or close the department, complete shift handoffs, and report status
  - Assign tasks, monitor productivity, and step in to support associates
  - Maintain merchandising, stocking, and recovery standards
  - Resolve customer questions and escalate issues as needed

Requirements:
  - 1+ year retail or customer-facing lead experience
  - Comfortable directing peers and giving clear instructions
  - Reliable, punctual, and able to work flexible shifts
  - Basic computer/POS familiarity
  - Standing for extended periods, lifting up to 40 lbs
location: Santa Rosa Beach, FL · Miramar Beach, FL · Panama City Beach, FL

title: Supervisor
description:
Alto HR is placing a Supervisor across our Walmart locations in the Florida Panhandle. You'll oversee a team of retail associates, ensuring department targets are hit and Walmart operating standards are upheld.

  Responsibilities:
  - Supervise associates assigned to your department or shift
  - Plan and assign daily workloads
  - Train new hires on procedures and safety
  - Conduct shift huddles and provide ongoing performance feedback
  - Coordinate with management on staffing, inventory, and scheduling

Requirements:
  - Retail supervisory experience preferred
  - Strong leadership presence and communication skills
  - Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast-paced environment
  - Reliable transportation and flexible availability
  - Standing for extended periods, lifting up to 40 lbs
location: Santa Rosa Beach, FL · Panama City Beach, FL

title: Picker
description:
Alto HR is placing a Picker (Online Grocery / OPD Associate) across our Walmart locations in the Florida Panhandle. You'll fulfill online grocery and pickup orders accurately and on time, helping customers get exactly what they ordered.

  Responsibilities:
  - Pick items from the sales floor using a handheld scanner per customer order
  - Stage orders in the correct temperature zones (ambient, chilled, frozen)
  - Verify substitutions and quality of perishable items before bagging
  - Load orders into vehicles at curbside pickup
  - Maintain pick rate and accuracy targets

Requirements:
  - Strong attention to detail and accuracy
  - Comfort using handheld scanners and basic mobile apps
  - Ability to walk extensively (8–12 miles per shift) and lift up to 40 lbs
  - Reliable and punctual; flexible morning, evening, or weekend availability
  - Customer-friendly attitude for curbside loading
location: Santa Rosa Beach, FL · Miramar Beach, FL · Panama City Beach, FL
